title: orifu's modpack
description: Rosebudly Optimized. the only orifu approved modpack on the internet
body:
ever wanted to play minecrap but WORSE??
--- this pack is opinionated in favour of vanilla gameplay. you can expect a bunch of client side mods with enhanced performance, technical tools, and other nice tweaks. and to top it all off, chat reports aren't sneakily removed! see also [keybinds for masa mods](https://lumity.dev/orifu/modpack/src/masa-mods.md) and included [vanilla tweaks](https://lumity.dev/orifu/modpack/src/vanilla-tweaks.md)! to get access to beta releases (and automatic updates), import one of these links into prism launcher: - 26.2 (beta): https://pack.orifu.net/26.2 - 26.1: https://pack.orifu.net/26.1 - 1.21.11: https://pack.orifu.net/25.4 - more coming soon! --- credits - [vanilla tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/), which is bundled with this pack --- NOT AN OFFICIAL ROSEBUD PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH ROSEBUD OR THONKMAN.
